subcodes.first_line: This is a day wherein the knowledge and wisdom of the human soul must needs be made manifest in the realm of existence, like unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که باید معرفت و دانائی شخص انسانی در عالم وجود بوجود آید مثل
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge of self, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @mystical themes
